[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110111 5
1 1001010 3
2 0100101 3
3 1111111 a
4 0001000 1
5 1111010 5
6 0010100 2
7 0110111 5

01 10 0100000 1
12 21 0100101 3 match 2
23 32 0001000 1 match 4
34 43 0001000 1 match 4
45 54 0010000 1
56 65 0010100 2 match 6
67 76 0110010 3
70 07 0110000 2

02 20 1110000 3
13 31 0000000 a
24 42 1111010 5 match 5
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0110010 3
57 75 0010000 1
60 06 0110000 2
71 17 0100000 1

03 30 0000000 a
14 41 0100000 1
25 52 0010100 2 match 6
36 63 0000000 a
47 74 0111010 4
50 05 0010000 1
61 16 0100101 3 match 2
72 27 0111010 4

04 40 1110000 3
15 51 0000100 1
26 62 0110111 5 match 0 7
37 73 0001000 1 match 4
[completion]
